name: Cauliflower Marranca
recipeIngredient: 2 heads cauliflower, cut into florets and stems
1/2 teaspoon salt and pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice with water in a three-quart saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to the lowest possible setting.
4. Stir once with a fork, cover, and let cook for 20 minutes until all water is absorbed.
5. In a separate pan, sauté mushrooms and onions in olive oil.
6. Add the juice of two lemons.
7. Wash cauliflower and cut into florets; chop usable stems.
8. Sauté with onions and mushrooms (add more oil if needed).
9. Include basil, garlic, salt, and black pepper to taste.
10. Cook for about five minutes.
11. Combine with cooked rice, mixing thoroughly.
12. Add cheddar cheese (or your choice of cheese) and stir.
13. Transfer mixture to a greased 9x13-inch pan.
14. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes until the cheese melts and the top is browned slightly.
